//: AeroWars configuration. Lines with the '//' key are comments and are ignored.

General.//: Language file to use from the lang/ folder (en_us, pt_br, ...).
General.//LobbyWorld: World players are returned to when a match ends or they leave.
General.//LobbySpawn: Optional 'x,y,z,yaw,pitch' lobby spawn; empty = world default spawn.
General.//Prefix: Chat prefix for plugin messages (branding). PrefixEnabled=false removes it entirely; edit Prefix to rebrand. Supports {#RRGGBB} color tags.

Setup.//SpawnWand: Ferramenta dada ao admin no setup; left-click num bloco marca spawn, botão direito remove. Deve ser uma ferramenta de quebrar (não arma). Fica travada no inventário até finalizar.

Match.//: Global match tuning. Per-arena min/max players come from the arena's spawn count.
Match.//SpectateOnDeath: Dead players become spectators instead of being removed.
Match.//SaveInventory: Ao entrar na partida: salva inventário + gamemode e limpa; ao sair/finalizar, restaura. Jogadores entram em modo Adventure.

Cages.//: Glass/barrier cages that hold players on their island during the countdown.

Loot.//: Chest loot. Loot tables are defined in loot.json in the plugin data folder.
Loot.//FillOnStart: Fill every chest once when the match starts (the initial loot; not an 'event').

Events.//: Unified in-match events. Each entry has a Type and a Time (seconds since the match started). Type 'refill' re-rolls every chest; 'loot_upgrade' upgrades a growing share of common chests to MIDDLE loot and refills. Add/remove entries freely.
Events.//Randomize: When true, each event's Time is IGNORED and the enabled events fire at random moments, in random order, spread across the match — always inside the match duration and never closer than MinGapSeconds (so nothing fires too fast). When false, events fire at their Time.

Kits.//SelectionDuringCountdown: Let players open the kit menu while waiting/counting down.

Rewards.//WinnerCommands: Run by console on win. {player} = winner name, {arena} = arena.
Rewards.//Economy: Pays coins on kill/win via an installed economy plugin (overworld economy, EliteEssentials, Ecotale). No-op if none is present.

//Effects: Victory fireworks show and the winner's podium during the end celebration.

Effects.//FireworkParticles: Native Hytale firework particle systems, one picked at random per burst.
Effects.//PodiumEnabled: Raise the winner(s) onto a block podium above the arena centre during the celebration.

Party.//KeepTogetherByDefault: Default of a party's 'keep together' preference (leaders toggle it in the party menu). ON = only join matches where the whole party fits one team, never split (leader is told if no arena fits); OFF = an oversized party is split, overflow members randomly moved to other teams.

//Platform: Spawn platform built into a freshly created void template world (/aerowars world create). Size is clamped odd; keep <= 15 so it stays inside the preloaded spawn chunk.
//Spectator: Hypixel-style spectator hotbar given on death: a living-player tracker (opens a teleport modal) and a return-to-lobby item. Slots are 0-8; items are locked in place and removed when leaving.
//Database: Optional SQL persistence for stats/leaderboards (HikariCP, like Plots). Driver chosen by JdbcUrl (sqlite/mysql/mariadb/postgres). Drivers are NOT bundled — drop HikariCP + the JDBC driver on the server classpath; otherwise it falls back to stats.json. A bare 'jdbc:sqlite:aerowars.db' resolves under the plugin data dir.
